title: All the evas from Neon Genesis Evangelion are in Eva 20
display_title: All the evas from Neon Genesis Evangelion are in Eva 20
wikitext:
[]: All the evas from Neon Genesis Evangelion are in Eva 2.0 Post by Bentkey » Sat Apr 26, 2014 3:07 am I was watching 2.0, and after the scene where the three children fight Sahaquiel and it shows Shinji in the cockpit with the Stigmata on his hands, we see a shot of some random destruction probably from the second impact. While the camera is panning to the left, we see what are undeniably three destroyed evas. Two are in front. One is kind of in the background. The one is the background looks like unit-00. The one at the front-left looks like it has its face destroyed like unit-02 in End of Evangelion. Finally, the one on the right looks very much like unit-01. My thoughts it could tie into the sequel theory; it could be a nod to End of Evangelion. What i really want to know is how those things got there and why they look like this. Answers or speculation would be very much appreciated.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Apr 26, 2014 3:28 am Screen grabs?

[]: Re: All the evas from Neon Genesis Evangelion are in Eva 2.0 Post by pwhodges » Sat Apr 26, 2014 3:56 am deleted (wasn't worth saying)

[]: Post by Sachi » Sat Apr 26, 2014 4:00 am I'm fairly confident I know which cut you're referring to. That's the immediate aftermath of the Sahaquiel confrontation; when the Angel exploded it dealt a tremendous amount of damage on each Eva. When the Angel stigmatized Unit-01, it was also applying all of it's downward force directly on to the Eva's body; this amount of pressure pretty much ruined Unit 01's arms in the end. What we see in the shot you're referring to is the damaged Evas collapsed in the bloodied remains of the dead Angel. But I could be off the mark, and the shot you're referring to is not the one I'm thinking of. Screen shots would help.

[]: Post by unitM » Sat Apr 26, 2014 9:10 am Just checked. That was a picture of the damage after the Sahaquiel fight, not the 2nd impact. I'm only spotting 2 of the Evas though.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Apr 26, 2014 9:32 am unitM wrote: Just checked. That was a picture of the damage after the Sahaquiel fight, not the 2nd impact. I'm only spotting 2 of the Evas though.

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Apr 26, 2014 9:42 am Eva-02 gets her own dedicated shot later, after Shinji gets his pat on the head from Gendo SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Apr 26, 2014 9:45 am I had a feeling that this is what we were talking about. I just couldn’t believe someone would suggest Second Impact was the cause while trying to tie it in with a Sequel Theory.

[]: Post by Sachi » Sat Apr 26, 2014 9:55 am Yup, it was exactly the shot was I referring to!

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Apr 26, 2014 1:39 pm Well, I don't think there's a whole lot more to say here.
summary: []: All the evas from Neon Genesis Evangelion are in Eva 2.0 Post by Bentkey » Sat Apr 26, 2014 3:07 am I was watching 2.0, and after the scene where the three children fight Sahaquiel and it shows Shinji in the cockpit with the Stigmata on his hands, we see a shot of some random destruction probably from the second impact. While the camera is panning to the left, we see what are undeniably three destroyed evas. Two are in front. One is kind of in the background. The one is the background
